title: Desert Survival House
description: adds a small desert house, with some villagers, perfect for the start of the game
body:
This Mod adds a desert stone house to the game, perrfect for the start of the game to stay in for the first nights so that you are safe from the monsters or a nice spot to trade with the villagers inside the house.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/982c6ee7504ad26162a5d113e6064d0ed3cddafe.jpeg)

you can find the strcuture only in desert biomes.

![Desert House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb68ce4dc2512325212af5915abcabebf9886611_0.webp)

feel free to put it in your modpack!
